From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[album](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/album "wiktionary:album")***, ***[albums](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/albums "wiktionary:albums")***, or ***[álbum](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/%C3%A1lbum "wiktionary:álbum")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

An **[album](/wiki/Album "Album")** may refer to a collection of audio and video recordings or a book for holding a collection of items (such as photographs, stamps, or coins) on pages that are initially blank.

**Album** may also refer to:

## Music

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Album_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Music")]

* *[Album – Generic Flipper](/wiki/Album_%E2%80%93_Generic_Flipper "Album – Generic Flipper")*, by the band Flipper
* [*Album* (Girls album)](/wiki/Album_(Girls_album) "Album (Girls album)")
* [*Album* (Joan Jett album)](/wiki/Album_(Joan_Jett_album) "Album (Joan Jett album)")
* [*Álbum* (Lu album)](/wiki/%C3%81lbum_(Lu_album) "Álbum (Lu album)")
* [*Album* (Dave Pike Set album)](/wiki/Album_(Dave_Pike_Set_album) "Album (Dave Pike Set album)")
* [*Album* (Public Image Ltd. album)](/wiki/Album_(Public_Image_Ltd_album) "Album (Public Image Ltd album)")
* [*Album* (Quorthon album)](/wiki/Album_(Quorthon_album) "Album (Quorthon album)")
* [*Album* (Ghali album)](/wiki/Album_(Ghali_album) "Album (Ghali album)")

## Film and television

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Album_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Film and television")]

* [*Album* (2002 film)](/wiki/Album_(2002_film) "Album (2002 film)"), a 2002 Indian film
* [*Album* (2016 film)](/wiki/Album_(2016_film) "Album (2016 film)"), a 2016 Turkish film
* ["Album" (*Land of the Lost*)](/wiki/Album_(Land_of_the_Lost) "Album (Land of the Lost)"), a television episode

## Other uses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Album_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Other uses")]

* [Album (Ancient Rome)](/wiki/Album_(Ancient_Rome) "Album (Ancient Rome)"), a board chalked or painted white, on which public notices were inscribed in black.
* [*Album* (magazine)](/wiki/Album_(magazine) "Album (magazine)"), a photography magazine
* [Comics album](/wiki/Comics_album "Comics album"), a common format for publishing Franco-Belgian comics
* [Confession album](/wiki/Confession_album "Confession album"), used to record the opinions of friends
* [Photo album](/wiki/Photo_album "Photo album"), a book of related photographs
* [Stamp album](/wiki/Stamp_album "Stamp album"), a book in which a collection of postage stamps may be stored and displayed
* [Sticker album](/wiki/Sticker_album "Sticker album"), a book in which a collection of stickers may be stored and displayed

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Album_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: See also")]
